title: Slab-built octagonal trinket box
notes: Eight-sided box with a fitted slab lid. Cut eight equal-angled slab panels and join at 135-degree angles using slip and score. Base is a separate slab. Lid is a flat octagonal slab with a small knob. Approximately 80 mm across, 60 mm tall. Incised geometric decoration optional on lid and sides. PVA sealed.
